description: Tiered PDF guideline library organized by processing status and VC-citation tier. All folders fully audited as of Mar 20. 1,547 articles in DB, 404 PDFs in library, 100% codon coverage.

root.notes: MOVE_STUCK_FILES.ps1 is a PowerShell script for resolving permission-locked files

00_non-codon.description: Processing backlog. All 146 PDFs are codon-named with DB records but have NOT been through the extraction/enrichment/synthesis pipeline.
00_non-codon.root_notes: 146 codon-named PDFs awaiting pipeline processing. 1 txt file (has_extraction_audit.txt). Composition: 28 from has_extraction audit (ART-1398–1425) + 18 from needs_review (ART-1426–1443) + 1 BackPainPCP reference + 99 from unexamined (ART-1450–1548).

has_extraction.description: Former staging area. Now empty after audit.

needs_review.description: Former review staging. Now empty — all 20 files processed.

unexamined.description: Former holding area for unaudited PDFs. Now empty — all 101 files processed.

01_local_lite.description: ITE-linked articles with lightweight processing. Not VC-cited.

02_codon.description: VC-cited articles with verified correct content. All 70 PDFs audited and content-verified against DB records. Permissions unlocked.
02_codon.notes: Was 73 pre-audit. 3 deleted (wrong content), 6 re-IDed with correct ART-IDs.

03_right_click.description: Fully processed PDFs — ran through the complete right-click pipeline (extract → synthesize → enrich → DOCX).

naming_conventions: Codon format: Author_Year#@#ART-XXXX@#@.pdf — ART-ID embedded between #@# start codon and @#@ stop codon
ALL files in library now use codon format (100% coverage as of Mar 20)

changes: Processed 20 needs_review PDFs: 18 new DB records (ART-1426–1443), 1 dupe deleted, 1 reference kept
Audited all 73 PDFs in 02_codon/: found 10 content mismatches + 1 duplicate ART-ID
Fixed 02_codon: deleted 3 wrong files, renamed 1 duplicate ART-ID, swapped 1 with correct PDF, re-IDed 6 mismatches (ART-1444–1449)
Processed 101 unexamined PDFs: 99 new DB records (ART-1450–1548), 2 dupes deleted
Emptied has_extraction/, needs_review/, and unexamined/ folders
Unlocked permissions on 02_codon and unexamined via icacls
